reviews.review_text: Great place for kids.

This was the most amazing place to come with a big group. I came here with a group of around 30-35 people (families with kids) and everyone had something to do. The tennis court was so much fun, and the waterpark had all the kids up early along with the fact that there are 2 different pools to choose from! The bike rental options are also a great idea, and all the kids were riding their bikes to each others cabins and around. It is also a great distance from the main beach and a great restaurant called The Treehouse which i also recommend. Overall, this place gets a 10/10 from me!

Really enjoyed my stay here. The cabin overlooking the lake was spacious and really comfortable, the view wonderful and I loved the hum of the fountain in the lake. Mine was a duplex cabin but it was very quiet, I didn’t hear the neighbors at all. The location is OK, outside the Byron centre, I had no car so had to rely on Uber and buses (not a very reliable timetable) which were not very frequent and didn’t run in the evenings (except on weekends). But all in all it was great value for money and a great, affordable place to stay in the Byron Bay area (which in itself I find a bit overrated).

What a Lovely 2 night stay my husband and myself had in a CABIN. We usually travel with a caravan and have stayed in parks all over AUSTRALIA we had not been to Byron Bay for 20 years but our stay in this clean,well set up cabin was great for a break .The staff from walking into the reception were so nice and explained the area and all things to fill in our 2 day stay.Thank to DISCOVERY PARK BYRON BAY for a great stay.
Just general great service great accommodation definitely affordable plenty of activities for kids and very welcoming :)

This was a great campground. They have 2 pools, splash park and other sports and things for kids. The facilities are nice. It’s a little ways from town so not really convenient if you have a campervan. Would stay here again!

This is by far the best campsite we’ve ever stayed at!! Everything was extremely clean, which was really enjoyable. There are plenty of activities on site, as well as food trucks. The campsite is very well maintained, and there are ponds scattered throughout.

Many thanks to the lady we met at reception, we had made a small mistake with our booking for the unpowered site and she fixed everything very efficiently, always with a smile!

I hope we’ll have the chance to come back. In any case, I 100% recommend it!!

The accommodation was clean but the dog box was very small with the bathroom sink so tiny, you couldn't even use it. No undercover parking, had to park in front of the cabin.
Wouldn't stay there again at $260 for 1 night, very expensive for what I received

What a nightmare. We spent one night at Discovery Parks in Byron and would absolutely not recommend it.

From the moment we arrived at 3pm, the group camping in front of us was blasting music and clearly had been partying since the night before. They were even using fire pits, which are not permitted. At 5pm, I called reception to report the noise, as the loud, inappropriate music completely ruined the whole camping experience.—but no one bothered to respond or follow it up.
That lack of action led to a dangerous situation later that night. Police were called after another camper, who was there with his two children, confronted the group and showed up with a knife. This should never have been allowed to escalate that far. It was entirely preventable.
Management failed to enforce their own rules and failed to act when concerns were raised. For a park that attracts families, this is unacceptable. Allowing this kind of behaviour puts guests at risk and ruins what should be a safe, relaxing environment.
Do better.

Very old. Our economy cabin was small and all doors have problems and is not shut . Literally all doors. I jammed my fingers with the bathroom door as it doesn’t shut. Pizza is rubbish. Italian is too expensive. Outside cafe is nice. We won’t be back. Fix the doors!

Great facilities for children. Outside bar and food trucks.  Kids ride around unsupervised on e-bikes etc at 20kmph but we're only allowed to go at 5kmph. Very dangerous especially near the entrance.  More lighting required on the lanes especially as you come out of the toilets. Could you also put a no parking sign outside the toilets for the kids scooters
Great park with clean facilities. But the speeding e bikes and kids on scooters need to be speed checked. Motorists kept getting texts reminding us of the 5km speed limit.
We had a beautiful 2 bedroom cabin overlooking the lake.  Very modern and clean.  Really enjoyed our stay here.

Staff here are absolutely lovely, but unfortunately there were several racist white men that made the place feel very unsafe. One night they were drunk and sitting by the bar and aggressively asked me about “walking my dog”, referring to my husband. We kept walking and they began talking about me needing a white *male genitalia*. It was revolting. They were not the only racists in the park, either. One couple accused us of being in their spot and the female started talking about “third world country people” and talking about garbage on the ground that our neighbour had left (another white couple by the way). Our other side neighbour told off the woman and warned us of racists around there. Til he said it, it hadn’t even really hit me. Apart from the one Asian receptionist (who is wonderful btw), there were only white folk around, including lots of Europeans and South Americans.
The facilities at the park are fantastic, but we won’t be back solely due to the folk that seem to fill the park. Lots of parents with unruly kids who have no interest in discipline, respect or safety. Way too much alcohol usage. The yoga instructors were also unfriendly, which was so disheartening, because it was the first detail of the park we were excited to try.

The room was absolutely amazing, reception answered any and every question we had to ask, and it’s located only 5 minutes away from the main town. Super easy to navigate, full of fun activities and friendly people and staff.

Superb campsite, extremely clean in the showers/toilets and the kitchens. There's plenty to do: swimming pool, tennis court, basketball, trampoline, yoga. Thank you to the whole team! We saw lots of animals!
what an awesome park! so welcoming and friendly..with a great atmosphere all around…we loved our stay 🩵

The caravans were big n spacious, had plenty of cooking facilities inside also BBQ areas outside. It had 2 pool areas, kids water park, sports area and bars/restaurants. Could also rent bikes in the premises
My family and I had an amazing stay, and shoutout to Kirsty :) will definitely come back!

Says king bed in the listing, just 2 singles smashed together, says over a lake, which is true, but it's full of pond scum and discarded floating bottles, listing didn't say it's shared with another room (that has 3 screaming kids in it yay) I can't turn the fan on full cause it's so wobbley it almost hits the ceiling, the photos of this $379 per night "cabin" must have made the Photoshoper alot of money.

Wow! Such a glorious, lush, peaceful environment for a week stay in Byron Bay. The park is lovely, the cabin was great and beds were fresh, clean and very comfortable! We made use of the cabin kitchen to the max, and the outdoor patio was perfect for early morning coffee and evening bird watching and late night star gazing. Biking around to stores and beaches made the entire experience memorable for sure!
Awesome

My husband and I stayed here at Discover for two nights with our van (rent). We had a good stay, our pitch was near the facilities (that were very clean).
We’re arrived quite late and they sent me a message for the procedure of the sel check-in, perfect!!
The only “bad” things were that the WiFi didn’t work out none of the days that we ere there and also I washed our clothes and I had to do the washing machine twice ‘case the first didn’t wash properly.
But anyway I recommend it, it was a good balance between services and facilities and the price!
Alles sehr sauber, nettes Team. Bus hält vor dem Eingang. Allerdings schon eine ganz schöne entfernung zum Stadtzentrum.

A fantastic park with green shady caravan sites next to the river. So many facilities here, 2 swimming pools, a water park, a bouncy thing for the kids, a pizza van and a fish and chip van as well as a cafe out in he front. They have 2 lakes and the most upmarket glamping I have seen. Toilets and bathrooms are very clean and are cleaned twice a day ( could do with a few more showers). Pricing was very reasonable under this he circumstances. Would definitely recommend staying here.

We recently stayed here for four nights on a powered drive-through site. The site itself was very spacious with plenty of room, which made setting up easy. The park is in a spectacular location and there is so much to do. The facilities were also excellent and well maintained.

The only downside for us was the number of people moving around the park late at night, with quite a bit of foot traffic at all hours.

Unfortunately, we also experienced an unusual incident where someone had defecated next to our camper. To the park’s credit, the situation was handled promptly and staff were very reassuring, explaining that this is not something that typically happens. They also have an after-hours number available for any concerns, which was reassuring to know.

Overall, it’s a beautiful park with great facilities, and the staff were helpful when dealing with our

We stayed in a Lakeside Cabin which was absolutely gorgeous! Very clean and modern, great beds, beautiful view and everything you need inside.  The Park itself is absolutely beautiful.  Once again, everything you need is right in the park. Food trucks, Cafe, Bar, bike hire and DOGS!! :-)  Staff were so friendly and helpful. We will most definitely be back!!
Couldn’t rate our stay more highly!
It was amazing free upgrade

We had such a great time at Discovery Parks Byron Bay! Such a beautiful location and the staff were so friendly and accommodating.
So thankful to Kirsty and Katie for all their help when I was having car troubles 🥹 Would  definitely stay again!

Amazing facilities especially for the price. Only complaints would be there were some dead ants & flies in the bathroom and I wasn't able to lock my door from the outside although this didn't bother me too much as I was only staying for a very short trip and took all my valuables out with me. Staff were also very friendly and the location was very ideal for me, overall would stay again :)
The cabin was very clean, the bed was comfortable. We got everything we needed. Swimming pool was great.

Really great prices. Great place for a family to stay with their pools, water park and other activities. Close enough to ride the push bikes into Byron and sight see. Second time we have stayed here and we are in the deluxe lakeside cabin and couldn’t be happier. Our cabin is literally above the water and the fountains make it so peaceful and relaxing. Love it. 🥰

Wij hebben hier 2 nachten geslapen en heel eerlijk… nee, dit was niks.

De kamer was echt heel klein, wat in de basis natuurlijk niet erg is, maar het voelde ook nog eens vies. Bij binnenkomst merk je direct de schimmel afdrukken op het plafond en de muur. Tevens hadden wij een mieren probleem in de badkamer, dr liepen continue zo’n 10-20 mieren langs de muur. Op de muur bij het dubbelbed zat gewoon een doodgeslagen mug? Heel erg in het zicht en gemakkelijk weg te halen, dat is toch een kleine moeite voor roomservice?

De douche werkte qua warmte en kou goed, maar de straal was ietwat slap.
Tevens was de douchemat heel vies, zat een hoop zand op, dus die zal wel niet afgeklopt zijn geweest.

Onder het bed schrok ik het meeste van. Niet dat je dit nou elke keer bekijkt, maar ik moest er toevallig bij omdat iets viel. Je kan altijd wel het verschil zien tussen “er is een keer vergeten te stofzuigen”, en “er is nog nooit gestofzuigd”. Dat is eerste is nog te begrijpen. Maar bekijk die foto van onder mijn bed maar eens en vertel mij maar eens dat er ooit in dit huis is gestofzuigd. Er zat zo’n dikke plak met stof onder het bed, volgens mij is er sinds de bouw nooit meer een stofzuiger langs geweest.

De bedden lagen prima en de handdoeken waren fijn en schoon. Wij kregen de indruk dat dit een geval is van, “er zijn te veel huisjes om klaar te maken dus doen we het minimale (wat voor de gast ook te zien is) en hopen op het beste”. De basis is hierbij gewoon fout.

Het park zelf zag er netjes en verzorgd uit dus het verbaasde ons echt dat de woning er zo uit ziet. Wij hebben geen gebruik gemaakt van de voorzieningen op het park, ik hoop dat de kwaliteit daar echter wel beter is.

En vaak krijg je bij dit soort reviews een antwoord als “had ons gecontacteerd, dan hadden wij beoordeeld en ons best gedaan om er wat aan te veranderen!”. Maar wij hebben deze woning puur gebruikt als slaaplocatie om vervolgens op doorreis te gaan, wij zijn amper binnen geweest los van slapen. We hebben drukke dagen en hebben geen zin om elke keer alles maar te melden waar 2wij verblijven. Je zou deken dat een basis als dit gewoon goed moet zijn, maakt niet uit wat je betaald. Het was voor ons niet de moeite waard om dit tijdens het verblijf te melden zodat er toch nog even snel een stofzuiger door de woning kan. Want er veranderd dan eigenlijk niks: de basis is nog steeds dat er niet goed word schoongemaakt voor er nieuwe gasten komen. Als dit bij ons huis is, zal dat overal op het park wel zijn.

Weet dus dat dit de kwaliteit is die je kan verwachten als je hier gaat slapen. Als je dit niet erg vind en je slaapt er maar kort, is dit een prima plek om te stoppen, maar voor langere tijden of wat meer luxe zou ik deze zeker overslaan. Jammer, want je zit lekker dichtbij Byron Bay.

Cabins and amenities need a serious upgrade , everything is falling to pieces or already broken and just patched up. Food trucks were cancelled over the weekend with no information provided on check in. It was a struggle to keep cabin clean in the wet rain when only a small hand held brush and pan was provided to clean an entire cabin.Definitely not worth the expense paid, very disappointing and not at all what we expected.

Do you need a one stop vacation getaway for you and your small kiddos? Discovery Parks Byron Bay may be a great option for you.
Tucked just outside the bustle of Byron proper, the park offers a range of accommodation styles to suit different travel tribes, from deluxe yurts and cabins to powered sites for caravans and campervans. Whether you roll in with wheels or suitcases, there is a setup that makes settling in easy.

Where this place really shines is with younger children. The internal roads are perfect for scooter laps that seem to go on forever. The pool area and water park quickly become the center of gravity for families, with splashing, laughter, and the unmistakable soundtrack of kids burning off vacation energy. There is also a tennis court for those who want to swing a racquet, plus several small lakes scattered around the grounds that add a peaceful backdrop for morning walks or an end of day wander.

Communal BBQ stations are plentiful and free to use, which makes casual dinners simple and social. Just remember, like any good campsite citizen, you are responsible for cleaning up after yourself.

Our two bedroom cabin was basic but functional. Our son’s room was fitted with double bunk beds and a small nightstand, and that was about all the space available. Too bad we did not bring any cousins along to fill those bunks. Our room was similarly simple, with undecorated white walls and no frills. That said, it was clean to the eye and nose, and sometimes that is exactly what you want after a long day outdoors. The bathroom and shower were spotless, and the water pressure was excellent, a small luxury that never goes unnoticed.

This is not a luxury resort, nor does it pretend to be. It is a relaxed, family friendly base where kids can roam, parents can exhale, and days naturally drift from scooters to swims to sunset BBQs.
If your idea of a great family break includes sandy feet, tired happy children, and the sweet sound of quiet after bedtime, Discovery Parks Byron Bay might just deliver the reset you did not know you needed.

Had such a lovely stay. Only a short stopover for 2 nights. Staff were super friendly and helpful. Lovely accommodation, fresh, clean and fully equipped with all you need. Perfect location too. Not far from everything. Plenty to do around the park with lovely surroundings. Lots of Large water dragons around the creek to spot. Beautiful creature’s. Wouldn’t hesitate to stay again.

Nous avons passés un bon séjour makq il y a pas mal de poins a améliorer.
Le parc aquatique est fermé et nous avions réservé spécialement pour ça pour les enfants , vraiment dommage.
La moitié des machines a laver et sèche-linges ne fonctionnent pas 😬 et il a seulement 1 machine et 1 sèche linge a carte bleue.
Et le seche linge a abîmé certains de nos vêtements a cause d'une grille fendue a l'intérieur..
Les douches s'evacuaient mal , la première fois il y a avait une forte odeur d'urine.
La piscine n'était pas très propre non plus.
Par contre personnel vraiment très sympa
J'espère que vous améliorerez ces quelques points noirs car vous avez un beau site

Great sites. Clean amenities. Friendly office and grounds staff. Lots of food trucks to choose from.  Pet friendly and very welcoming.  Great location from Brisbane and close to Byron Bay.  Definitely will be a return guest.
The cabin was a bit smaller thatn expected but that aside I enjoyed my stay
So fun for the family!
i made an accidental booking with the wrong date, my money was returned and i received amazing customer service from management. thank you

We have previously stayed at Discovery Byron Bay, and thought that the amenities needed a little TLC. So after not staying here for while we decided to come back and see if things had changed. OMGOSH what a difference, staff are extremely friendly and nothing is a problem for them. What I was more impressive was the hospitality within the park, food trucks and Kombi Bar serving local brewed drinks. And even a Gelato Bar for Desert. And push bikes that you can hire. Totally different park from our previous stays. The park is kept very clean and staff around the park walking around with a smile on their faces and happy to help if need be.

I highly recommend staying at Discovery Byron Bay. Well done to Management and Team ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ #340

Amazing experience found the services and amenities better than the luxury hotels I stayed at in Gold Coast with half the prices. It was clean, quiet and a safe space for all age groups especially families with children. Looking forward to staying again.
Great place for family holidays with loads of kids activities.

We had an amazing stay at Discovery Parks Byron Bay. The park is very well organised, with excellent facilities and a welcoming atmosphere. Everything was clean and well maintained, including the bathrooms, which were spotless.

We were very well looked after by the staff, especially Talita, who made our experience even more special with her kindness and great service from the start. There is plenty of entertainment and space to relax, making it perfect for families, couples, or anyone looking for a comfortable and enjoyable stay.

We absolutely loved our time here and would definitely recommend it. We can’t wait to come back!
Heaps of great facilities. Will be back!

We had our brand new car damaged by children riding push bikes constantly up and down the road in front of our cabin unsupervised.
Spoke to reception and was told to send an email regarding the incident but never received a reply or phone call.
Their conditions of staying at the park say children must be supervised at all times but they are riding bikes all over the park all day very dangerously.
We would not stay their again.
Damage to the car $1000 to repair.
Kate the park manager and her team went above and beyond to ensure our stay was safe and enjoyable! Great customer service.

Stayed here in July for our first caravan holiday experience and we loved it!

The kids had an absolute blast with the jumping pillow, water park, pools, and the extra activities put on for the holidays.

Facilities were mostly clean and in good condition.
Great place for the kids,  beds were comfy pillows were a little fat and hard for females,  may be OK for large men.  But had everything we needed and great wet park for the kids playing

We stayed in a ‘Superior 2 Bedroom Lakeside Cabin’
Our cabin was barely lakeside which was disappointing as we booked the cabin because it had been advertised as lakeside.

The cabin was very dirty, we contacted reception and asked for linen to be changed as there were visible brown marks and blood spots on the sheets. The rest of the cabin and bathrooms were also dirty, we contacted reception to asked for it to be re cleaned to be told it couldn’t be done that day and that someone would come the next day.. the cabin was never cleaned.
There were cobwebs everywhere inside the cabin, dirty hand prints and marks up the walls throughout, dust on all surfaces, visible dirty marks on the floors, and I could go on…

For the price we paid $600 a night it was most definitely not worth it.

I would not recommend 👎🏼

This is by far the worst campground I’ve ever stayed at—and I’ve stayed at quite a few!

Paying $120 per night for a site without electricity, only to shower in filthy restrooms full of urine, paper, sand, and hair everywhere… Cleaning must have been done only twice in four days!! This is unacceptable given the price, even during the Christmas period. They should schedule more frequent cleaning rounds considering how full the campground is. The reception staff don’t even seem to be aware of the cleaning situation in their own campground. As for the washing machines, apparently three are enough for the entire campground!

Honestly, don’t trust the Discovery brand image, because this place does not meet the quality standards of the other campgrounds in this chain at all. Stay away!!

Don’t stay here if you’re camping and rely on the amenities. Maybe fine for cabins as they looked alright. Camp somewhere else.

Amenities are disgusting and cleaned ONCE A DAY from my observations (only 9:30pm). It feels more like a hostel with the level of courtesy amongst people using the kitchens and bathrooms. I’ve stayed in a lot of caravan parks but this one is the worst! It’s so big and clearly they make more money from their cabins and do not prioritise any cleaning or maintenance for the campsite amenities.

Front desk called me two days after I arrived to ask me if I would be coming.

You can tell they don’t care if you look at the reviews and see they only respond to the good ones. Never staying in this hole again!

leuk park waar huisje,clampings en caravans / tent  staan . Alles is echt aanwezig voor alle leeftijden maar kids kunnen zich uitleven in zwembaden. Het is 30 min lopen over goed pad langs de weg naar Byron city. Maar lopen te ver je kunt ook fietsen en steps  huren. Scheeld betaald parkeren in Byron als er al een plekje is.
Economy cabin war ok, aber ein bisschen abgeranzt
Rude staff, the customer service needs a review.
Flawless campsite with a very fair price for unpowered campsites. Probably best amenities we had in whole Australia.

Excellent value for money.
The bathrooms were usually clean.
The swimming pools were very nice.
The kitchen was generally fine, although at night it was sometimes a little dirty.
The sites are a good size.
The receptionists were very friendly!
I would return!

We stayed camping and had a great experience. The service at reception was excellent, the facilities were perfect, and the cleanliness of the bathrooms, kitchen, and common areas was outstanding — 10/10. We will definitely come back.

Lovely park.  Amenities clean & modern.  We were thankful to get a dog friendly spot for 1 night but after looking around I think we got the worst site in the park (20).  Anyway quiet pleasant stay.  Good spot coming into town.  |Per another review we walked along walking track 25 mins to Treetop Cafe on Belongil Beach for a delicious meal & drinks for dinner.  5-10 mins drive to lighthouse walk in the morning.  |Travellers, backpackers & permanents all quiet & well behaved.  |Beautiful town, enjoyed our overnight stay. |FYI We did see a young fellow helping himself/ going through the fridge food in the camp kitchen in the morning.. completely unbothered that he was seen.

More then satisfied. I had late chech in perfect organised. The manager ladys are very polite and profesional.
My daughter and me got upgrade superior cabin, lake view and it is AMAIZING!  Clean, location, pool  activities, free yoga....Perfect for children and adults too. First, but deffinitely not last time here. Would recomend it to everyone. Thank you Discovery Parks!
Tidy, clean and quiet.

Beautiful park to stay at amenities were really nice but lacked proper cleaning. Showers had mould that I myself cleaned whilst in there. Blood on the back of toilet door was never cleaned. Sanitation bins overflowing for the whole week we were there. Laundry was a disaster. For a park this size at times only 2 washing machines worked. Wait times to use one was over 8 hrs after lining up.
A very nice spot to camp. It’s far anough out to be cummfy

SUPER DISCOVERY!!!
We are in love with this camping!
The workers, the cleanliness, the services and the plants around you, make your stay here fantastic!
Keep going like this!!! 🌞✨🌷

Mooie camping, leuk splashpark voor de kids. Fijn dat ze yoga hebben.

Er zijn wel verbeterpuntjes. Wassen is een drama. Te weinig wasmachines voor het aantal gasten. Twee van de vier zijn kapot. De twee die het doen zijn vies en komt je was stinkend uit. Kleding heeft 3 uur in de (gratis) droger gezeten en was nog niet droog.
Het verwarmde zwembad ziet er armoedig uit. Er staat meer onkruid dan gras omheen. Daarentegen is het andere zwembad wel mooi met een schaduwdoek (en net zo warm)
Great short stay, thanks for the room upgrade!

We Booked a site unaware that it was a double slab and therefor unable to put our gazebo up. Then found another site cheaper and asked for a refund for the excess amount…. But was told that was impossible but after some negotiation they still charged us  $76,- for choosing another site and I was only able to get the $129,-in a discovery stay voucher as that is the rules when booking a site as they said someone else could have booked…. But the place was almost booked out and the likelihood of someone else taking that spot was high and sure enough less then 5 min later someone else had taken it, win win for them. However moving on….

we booked and paid in full a month later for the site we loved from last time but when turning up they had given it to somebody else as they had decided to stay longer…. I was very disappointed and when driving past the people who had taken our site they had a van with no set up ….meaning they could have moved in a split second to another site so we could have kept the site we originally booked and paid for. It is ok for them to give away an already booked site but on the other hand when I had to move to another site due to an unforeseen circumstance. Different story. I’am Very upset I was not informed…before going there so I could have chosen another option or caravan park
They are super inflexible and un caring and only care about themselves no customer service
how about “so sorry we had to do this to you we should have informed you… we can give you a really nice site for the same price”

We stayed in a powered tent site. The shared bathrooms were good, and there was plenty of entertainment for the kids. The food trucks on Saturday were also a nice addition.||However, a few things could be improved. The powered tent sites are very close to the road, which made the nights quite noisy. Our site had almost no grass, mostly bare earth, and there were many bugs, turkeys, and ibis around. The oven in the kitchen near the reception was in poor condition and looked like it hadn’t been cleaned in a long time. The other kitchen, closer to the pool, appeared to be much better maintained.

A really good holiday park and feels like a community place of its own. Super professional staff. All amenities are top class and such a beautiful stop. They also have their own fish and chips food truck in the park.
So many activities for all age groups
It’s guarded well and efficient system for visitors comfort. We wanted to stay longer and will come back anytime when we visit again. Worth the money.
Excellent venue, close to everything, lovely set up, great kids activities, helpful staff , the best prices going thank you we'll be back again.

The place is amazing. We stayed there for almost a week. The site for tents that we got had trees with a lot of shade luckily. All super comfortable facilities, kitchen, tennis courts, pools, etc.
A pity but it makes me take away 1 star is the loud noise of the streets that doesn't allow sleeping well at night and the bad cleaning of the women's bathroom that always had a bad smell.
Have stayed twice and will stay again
Loved our stay in our cabin, everything was clean and beds very comfortable. Definitely worth a visit.
Loved the place 🛌 super clean, comfy, and felt just like home. The bed was so cozy, and everything was spotless. Perfect spot for a relaxing stay, I’d totally come back!
I love here so much. lovely view and animals

We had an incredible stay at the park, we went as a family booking with 26 people for my grandmas birthday, we chose to stay at cabins in the park as the park has amazing amenities for the 7 kids we had under 8 years old. The staff were amazing, friendly , kind people, they went above and beyond for the 4 nights we stayed.

We’re regular visitors to Discovery Parks Byron Bay and absolutely loved our stay this year! The Halloween activities for the kids were so fun,  thank you for another great experience.

Stacey, Grant, Emmet, Riley & Elle 🎃

Loved our stay there, cabin was cozy but comfortable. Staff were awesome & very helpful at check in, food truck on site makes great for a meal when too tired to cook after a long day. Shower was tight for a big bloke & the bedroom could use a ceiling fan, bed was comfortable.

Absolutely stunning place to stay! We were very surprised with a free upgrade, which made our stay even better. The accommodation was spotless.

The staff could not have been friendlier or more helpful, always greeting us with a smile and happy to assist with anything. The facilities were fantastic — everything you could possibly need for a comfortable, relaxing stay.

The only downside is that it’s a bit of a walk into town, but honestly, the peaceful setting more than makes up for it. Would 100% stay here again!
𝙶𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚝 𝚕𝚘𝚌𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗, 𝚜𝚞𝚙𝚙𝚘𝚛𝚝𝚒𝚟𝚎 𝚜𝚝𝚊𝚏𝚏 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚐𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚝 𝚊𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚒𝚝𝚒𝚎𝚜 .

DO NOT CAMP HERE if you need sleep, have little kids or expect any common courtesy of quiet after 10pm or even midnight or 2am or 4am for that matter! They let people stay up talking and drinking all hours of the night. It’s currently 2am and I have a group on both sides of me up drinking and I called night staff that they recommend calling, but he just said everyone is allowed to stay up making noise as long as they want as long as it’s not deemed “excessive” however any level of talking, laughing, drinking, banging car doors and eskies with neighbours 2metres apart and nothing but a layer of tent material between us is in fact excessive. So disrespectful. So so so tired and drained and going home tomorrow. Won’t stay another night. What a horrible experience after spending so much effort to book and set up and get here. I’m also pretty far away from the main road and the car noise is still really bad all night.

To make matters worse I walked past the yoga instructor on her way to the space for yoga and said I was excited for yoga, maybe I could shift my energy after such a bad night, she shot me down promptly to assure me how unwelcome I am with a kid. Well duh.. I hadn’t intended on having him in class but I certainly wasn’t interested in her class at all after that attitude. Yuck.

Really cool resort to stay for families,Campers and group of friends. I stayed in a cabin which was 2bhk. Very nice large and spacious with outdoor verandah and lots of chairs for large groups. Their swimming pool is really noce spot to sunbathe and enjoy with kids. They have a small waterpark right there. Campervan area looked spacious as well. They have a fish and chips truck in premises open till 7pm and a coffee and breakfast cafe at entrance Open till 2pm. Staff are very helpful rooms are nice, wish they provided with toothpaste and dish washing liquid in the cabin. Things you get are- refrigerator with a water jug and a cream packet for some reason. Large wardrobes with hangers. Hand body wash, shampoo conditioner and hair dryer. There were two TVs in the cabin and a large sofa. Iron with a itoning board and clothesline. No laundry tho and I wasn’t provided i formation if something was available. The cabin had a air conditioner which seemed appropriate. Overall 100% recommend. If you do not have a car they have ebikes for hire. But it is about a 45min walk away or a 5minute car ride away from main city.
Dog friendly cabin was not people friendly. Uncomfortable seating made our 3 day stay miserable

I understand that there was a policy to cancelling late notice! although after an unexpected death my whole trip had to be cancelled and I had no choice but to travel home. Upon request of a free cancellation due to the circumstances. It was declined!! There should be an exception for unforeseen circumstances!!! Seriously. Keep the $387 and I hope karma hits you with an unexpected death!!!

Absolutely amazing!!! Definitely returning already planning our next stay! Friendly welcoming staff and very accomodating. The kids area is superb! They had an absolute ball. Can not fault this place at all.
Great park...
Perfect location where you can enjoy your relax and your time. Excellent service and lovely studio. Thank you very much!

I enjoyed my stay the only problem I had was seeing employees on their phones with headphones in on a golf cart DRIVING day and night while their are kids running everywhere with not many adults following that’s a recipe for disaster the cabin was nice rooms got way to hit even with the aircon on

We thoroughly enjoyed our two night stay.
Our cabin was spacious, clean and perfectly located across from the jumping pillow, pool & water park for the kids.
Reception team were lovely to deal with.
Highly recommend a stay here with the family.

One of the prettiest parks in NSW and beyond. You can’t fault the cabins and the staff are superbly ready to help out with warmth and sincerity. It’s also pet friendly which really sets the mood. Wouldn’t stay anywhere else. Kids entertainment is endless from bouncing pillow, water park and peddle carts to gelato stand and food trucks. Tonight’s Harvest Supermoon certainly lit things up. Feels like home!
Great place for a small family holiday. Loved the service and the pool for the kids 🙏

Very clean and beautiful place with all the facilities we needed. The only downside was the bunk bed mattresses, which weren’t very comfortable. Other than that, everything else was excellent. The reception staff were also very friendly and welcoming.
We had a good time here. Service is friendly and the cabins are relatively clean.

Loved our stay here so much we extended by an extra night. Thank you SO much to the staff member on reception who helped us out and arranged everything for us. Splash park and pools were a massive hit with the kids. So much on each day including food vans and entertainment/games. Would love to return !

We stayed in a 2 bedroom superior cabin (Sleeps 4). It was sparkling clean and comfortable. The cabin is spacious and its deck looks over the lake. I will highly recommend this park for a stay in Byron. It’s a perfect mix of holiday park and a resort experience.
Stay away

Room described as two bedrooms, one with a queen bed and one with two bunk beds, but in reality there’s only one bedroom and the bunk beds are in the corridor in front of the bathroom between the kitchen and bedroom.

Kell was absolutely amazing! We just requested a few items and before we realised she was back with everything we needed.
Location is good.
Kids’s entertainment and facilities are very good.
To the person who handed in my husbands phone, thank you, thank you, thank you!! 🙌💛

Fab little spot - removed from the bustle of Byron (can be a negative + a positive). Cabins were very clean & equipped well, parking was convenient and beds were super comfy - would recommend and stay again.

We had an absolutely magnificent stay. From start to finish, everything was spot on – great location, excellent facilities, and such a relaxed atmosphere.

What really stood out was the staff. We had the bad luck of getting a flat tyre during our trip, but Gary and Ant went above and beyond to help us sort it out. We honestly couldn’t be more grateful for their kindness and support – they turned what could have been a stressful moment into a reminder of how caring and genuine the people here are.

The park itself is beautiful, well-kept and has everything you need for a perfect stay,
we’ll definitely be coming back!

Beyond their hard work, Gary and Ant are genuinely friendly and welcoming. They’re always ready with a smile, happy to share local tips on places to visit, and attentive to every detail. It’s not just maintenance — it’s true hospitality.

We had a flat tire on the way back to the campsite, and Gary and Ant didn’t hesitate to help. Not only did they change the wheel for us on the spot, but they also took the time to get the punctured tire properly fixed so we could continue our trip safely. Their kindness and efficiency made a stressful situation much easier. Truly grateful!

We were camping in our Avan. The sites are terrific. However, the male showers have very poor floor drainage, meaning dressing after shower is a damp affair. The floor needs re-tiling with a proper fall so that the water drains properly.

Came late last night with my partner.
The reception was closed, we called the number and a man came, he was really nice and helpful.
We slept one night for 37$ on a unpowered spot.
Showers and bathrooms are really cleans and news. This place is really peaceful.
We will be back, and recommend this place.

We booked a cabin but got upgraded to a clamping tent. This was well equipped with a queen bed and 2 single beds. Table and chairs, a fairly well equipped kitchenett. An outdoor BBQ table and chairs and an undercover outdoor eating area.

This place is fantastic, perfectly located, extremely clean, and incredibly kid-friendly. Whether you're into camping or just want to relax in nature, it's a great spot for both. It's close to the beach, right off the main road, and even has a nearby café for convenience.

The facilities are excellent: there's a barbecue grill, shared bathrooms, and if you choose a cabin, you get a private bathroom with hot water and a great shower. They provide everything you need, blankets, towels, shampoo, soap, conditioner, and even kitchen utensils.

Overall, it’s a wonderful family getaway, and I’ll definitely be coming back!
We had a private outlook onto a pond, fountains buffer outside noises. Heated pool was warm and pleasant seating area. We were out if town but that was good, we had all we needed at the park.

Location is out of town the worst part about this is I was sucked I the buying fish and chips from the food cart in the caravan park. Food was so bad in every way possible burnt,dirty oil used,fish not what you are paying for dripping oil and top it off over priced for small amounts of uneatable food.
DO NOT BUY ANY FOOD FROM THIS FOOD VAN IN THIS PARK!!!!

Cabin was a bit run down.
Black mould growing in a few places.
Lizzard in a pillow & a window with no covering.
Bed was very comfortable

Watch out this park will make you spend money. Fish and chip van on a Friday and pizza on Saturday 😂 you just can’t walk past it especially if you are already hungry. Both meals were fantastic. We really liked the park. The grass pitches were sadly very muddy but no one can control the weather. Amenities block by us was always flooded whenever people showered both mens and womens. Camp kitchen is easily the best camp kitchen we have seen on the east coast. So much space for everyone and proper cookers! Lots to do for children if you have them. We walked into town every day which was fine for us about 30mins each way. The cafe next door was really nice aswell good brunch and coffee. Would recommend.
Had an amazing holiday here - beautiful clean space, amazing staff, so many amenities! Would 100% recommend.

So me and the wife booked this 3 months ago and when we were looking at the photos and when we got there it was the complete opposite from what the photos show. There was a bunch of hairs and some strange stains on the sheets and believe that it was a poo stain, unfortunately I will not be attending again and little tremies bitting on the door at night and couldn't sleep all night and very very disappointed at this stay

Ssshhh, they have a secret pet policy for "camp sites" where some travellers are charged $10 per night and others are not! Book on their website and you won't be charged, but book at reception and you will be socked! Nowhere anywhere does it outline this policy and you'll receive a very surly response from staff at reception if you question the charge!
There's no problem with a pet fee but it needs to be charged to everyone and should be transparent.
After complaining about this matter the manager obviously with their backs up tried to block our booking extension, telling us the park was fully booked when clearly it wasn't. We ended up staying and lone behold the sites remained empty over the weekend!!

We stayed at an unpowered site which sadly got swamped during heavy rainfalls. Other than that we had an amazing stay! The Amenities were always clean, the camping kitchen is pretty nice with lots of space, stoves and fridges. The park also has a tennis court and swimming pools. It‘s a bit out of town, but super quiet.
Discovery parks looks alright in the photos but when your there, it’s the exact opposite as there is hair in the beds (don’t clean the beds), the wood is rotten and they gave us the wrong cabin

A mixed review from our stay at Discovery Byron.

Location, ground and facilities are great. $4 washer and $4 dryer.

There are two distinct areas to this park, the back section which is well away from the road, much newer and nicer, and accommodates caravan slab sites/glamping tents and the majority of the cabins. It is also close to the swimming pools/ jumping pillow/ water park/ yoga pavilion etc.
The front section of the park comprises powered and unpowered tent sites/ budget cabins and many unsightly and unkept permanent dwellings. There is a lot of road and inconsiderate backpacker noise.

I was surprised to find that this park charges a $10 per night fee for pets on SITES. This I discovered purely by accident after being charged more for the same stay as our friend. No information about this policy anywhere on their website, park policies, invoice or checkin paperwork. This needs to be made clearer to future travellers.

Daniel at reception was a stand-out, the only one with any real customer service skills. The others were very quick to get their backs up and appeared to be always edging for an argument.

The park is quite shaded and surrounded by wetland making it quite muddy. The caravan sites in the back section of the park were very chewed up.

Badly designed dump point which can't be opened and closed very easily at main bathroom.
Great campsite and holiday park, lots to do. Only thing was we didn’t realise to have to ask reception for locks for rental bikes. Error on our part though

Booked a cabin here because it was a last min trip and most other places in town were booked out. Pleasantly surprised, the cabin was lovely, park was beautiful and staff very helpful with changing booking dates due to cancelled flight (although a tad complicated as I booked through booking.com). Enjoyed riding the electric bikes into town too 😊👌🏼

The customer service was outstanding. Staff were accommodating when we had to change the dates of our booking and went out of their way to help us find a place to park our boat prior to check in. The cabin was had was roomy, clean and the beds were very comfortable. Could not be happier with this stay and cannot wait to come back.
Only downfall is no hot water after one shower
What a great place to stay. We will definitely be back again.

We were very impressed with friendliness, facilities and price.  It was set in beaut location with so much to offer for all the children.
We loved it.

Overall nice place to stay but the cafe??? I wanted two drinks and they were over $20 for the both of them which is just ridiculous price range, got an oatmilk coffee and watch the barista poor normal zimil milk into the coffee… I asked if it was oat and she blatantly lied to my face and said yes it is??? Next I payed for a large ice coffee and was passed a medium… I payed $10 I expect my large coffee when it’s my money at use. Other than the cafe it was okay stay
Had a great stay and staff were awesome

We had an incredible time at the Discovery park. I didn’t realised when I booked that I’d booked a tent site without a car. But the team member at the front desk graciously upgraded us to a large site and the view was beautiful. It was our first trip away as a family and we couldn’t have asked for anything better. We had lake views, it was super quiet. The facilities were amazing - the shower had better water pressure than my rental…Kitchen was clean and decked out. There was even live music, a beer truck and pizza, and a bunch of games out for the kids. Everything was so well thought out and planned. It really was the perfect camping trip!

Beautiful and new deluxe cabins with everything you need. Easy parking spot next to cabins and everything was so clean! The staff at reception was a bit off-putting though, with their lack of any customer service skills. But would definitely come back for the cabins and cleanliness.
The family had a great time at the park.
This is a massive park. With loads of fun activities for kids and adults. It is dog friendly  which is awsome for fur parents. They must be kept on a leash at all times.
Great stay, nice facilities, nice staff and good atmosphere. Was a bit disappointed that there's only 5 washing machines for the entire park and only 3 were working at the time.
Great location, clean and well set out, however the new shower facility has drainage issues.

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour au sein de ce camping.|Dès la réservation, l’équipe a été réactive et à l’écoute : nous avons eu toutes les réponses à nos questions avant notre arrivée, ce qui nous a permis de déposer nos sacs avant le check-in sans souci.||Sur place, tout s’est parfaitement déroulé. Le camping est propre, bien entretenu et très bien aménagé, avec tout ce qu’il faut pour passer un séjour agréable et confortable.|Cerise sur le gâteau : nous avons même eu la surprise d’être surclassés à notre arrivée ! Un geste que nous avons vraiment apprécié.||Un grand merci à toute l’équipe pour leur accueil et leur professionnalisme. Nous repartons ravis, et recommandons ce camping les yeux fermés.

I really liked this place! I thought that because it looked so simple, its facilities wouldn't be as nice, but I was wrong. The whole place is designed in harmony with rest, enjoyment, and outdoor activities.
Tolle Anlage. Sehr gepflegt. Schöne cabins.

Highly recommend when in Byron. So welcoming, best accommodation.

Special shout out to Jen for looking after us, can’t wait to go back
Nice friendly staff. Neighbor room was a little noisy. Location good. Furniture was ok. Bed awesome. Unfortunately my partner was locked in the bathroom. Will stay again.
very clean and nice room and great location in cheap price😍
Fantastic stay as always! Gets upgraded couple of times when the town is not in season. Lot of entertainment & facilities available. Check in and Check out was always fast and superb.

I forfeited 4 nights to escape this place..first night spent next to the highway..nightmare..then moved to a muddy patch next to the toilets..the whole park was pretty much empty..but the lad using the line trimmer flicking rocks at my car and tent set up..I asked him to stop it please and he said 'I'm nowhere near your car" before stopping work to whinge about me to the guy on the mower. DO NOT STAY HERE. WORST PARK.
Nice place
Came back for a second visit, great park!
Good for families
Brilliant park.  Loved the yoga, such an awesome instructor. Kids had a great time.  Loved the heated pool.

We have just left the park a day early. Sadly the sites are so dirty😏. Yes we know there’s been a lot of bad weather, but surely some artificial turf or concrete slabs could be put in. We have just been at 3 other parks on the NSW north coast, and there were no similar problems with dirt.
The ladies bathroom door knob wasn’t working and I was locked in at 9.30pm!  Fortunately my climb out the window wasn’t necessary, someone opened it for me. Thanks to the groundsmen who repaired it next day.
We hoped to use the lake for paddle boarding. Unfortunately it’s covered in weed😢
Is the water in the water park not usually heated?  Seems it was very cold🥶
Guess we wouldn’t return or recommend. 😏
However your reception staff are wonderful as are the maintenance guys.

We stayed in one of the new superior cabins with a lake view. The cabin was amazing, and the bed was very comfy. Loved having the toilet separate to the bathroom. Peaceful location and it was great seeing the solar train go past the park. My son and his family were there in their caravan, and the grandsons loved seeing the train as well. Definitely a family oriented park with several options for the kids. We even saw a water dragon, which the grandsons were very excited to see. They also have a van onsite providing food each day, with Saturday night being specifically pizza night from another caterer. Can recommend both caterers. Staff were very helpful and friendly. Highly recommend staying here.

We stayed on a powered site for 10 nights in probably the worst possible weather at the time. Very wet and boggy however, the park is beautifully maintained with immaculately clean amenities. The staff in reception are absolutely awesome and super friendly and can't do enough for you during your stay. We can also recommend the coffee shop in the park which, in our opinion, was the best coffee we've had in quite awhile. A must is to enjoy the Fish Club on-site for the most delicious crunchy chips ever! This is a terrific family park with children totally catered for. Highly recommend this family and dog friendly park. Thank you,  from Geoff & Vicki Lee

The girls at reception, Kim and Meg were welcoming and displayed professional greetings on our arrival.
The cabin was a gem! Clean, spacious and well appointed, the bed was comfortable and the shower amazing.
Heated pool, kids water park and playground on site and easy access to the beach.
First stop, 2 nights on our road trip to Melbourne, this place will be hard to beat.
Excellent caravan park with good clean amenities. Has 2 pools(1 heated) plus camp kitchens and very good children's play area and water park
Good place to go but worst reception ever all thanks to Jenn.

Lorsque nous sommes arrivées mercredi 19 mars, nous n’avions pas de réservation. Une fois à l’accueil, nous avons expliqué que nous souhaitions dormir au camping 2 nuits, pour 4 personnes et avec une voiture contenant une tente sur le toit. La dame de l’accueil nous a très gentiment placé dans le camping et tout ça pour une valeur de 130$ au total (136.10$ avec les taxes). Le camping en soit est très bien, assez grand, de bonnes infrastructures. Nous étions placées dans l’herbe, proche des poubelles mais il n’y avait pas d’odeur et avec une borne électrique nous permettant de recharger ce dont on avait besoin. Au centre du camping, une piscine, des jeux d’eau pour enfants (et adultes), un « matelas » gonflable sur lequel les enfants peuvent sauter, un court de tennis, des chaises longues et des emplacements bbq (d’autres infrastructures étaient écrites mais nous ne sommes pas passées devant). Il y a aussi un foodtruck fish&chips dans parc, le serveur est agréablement sympa. Une cuisine fonctionnelle est mise à disposition (lorsque nous y étions, celle-ci était sale, remplie de fourmis) ainsi que des frigos pour stocker votre nourriture. Les douches et toilettes sont propres, rien à dire. Des activités gratuites sont proposées, tel du yoga le matin. Gare à vous avec les horaires, ils ne vous laissent pas entrer si vous êtes en retard, même d’une minute ! Depuis le camping vous pouvez accéder au centre-ville à pieds pour une durée d’environ 30 minutes (nous ne l’avons pas fait, nous avons pris la voiture à chaque fois et avons toujours trouvé de la place, même le soir) ou en vélo, vous pouvez en louer au camping. Un café se trouve à côté du camping, vous pouvez sans problème prendre un petit déjeuner ou un brunch le matin, c’est très sympa. Je vous recommande d’y aller sans soucis si vous êtes en camping car ou voiture. Pour ce qui est des habitations fixes malheureusement je ne sais pas si celles-ci sont bien.

Campground is clean and family friendly.
Wifi could be better at the edges of the campground. The tennisballs are flat and should be replaced with new ones.

Just got back from a 3 night stay in a pet friendly 3 bedroom cabin  with my family and I can’t fault this park
Service communication was fantastic
Pool and water park were fantastic my kids had a ball nothing was a hassel for the staff every thou we asked for more hot chocolate (thanks guys my kids loved it )

The only recommendation I can make is the 3 bedroom cabin needs a washing machine

But thanks for a fantastic holiday

We stayed in a Deluxe Lakeside 3 Bedroom.  The room was clean and fairly new.  Didn't have that 'used by many before you' feel.  The Deluxe Lakeside 3 Bedroom - is actually a duplex cabin setup.  You walk into a 'indoor verandah' and off this you have 2 rooms.  One is a studio room with a kitchenette, King size bed, verandah with table and chairs, air-conditioning and big bathroom. Also had a bar table inside with seating to eat at.  The 2nd room is a 2 bedroom cabin. with a King side bed in 1 room and a 2nd bedroom with 2 sets of bunks.  Each bedroom is air-conditioned.  The beds were new and very comfortable. There is a full kitchen in the 2 bedroom cabin.  there is also a verandah with a table and chairs as well.  there is a door between the 2 verandah's so you can visit each other by going via the verandah's. Both rooms had their own key, so you couldn't get into the other 'cabin' unless the door was open.  Negative experience - We had issues with our Studio room, where there was no lock on the inside of the door, so if you shut the door, it was locked.  and if you didn't have the key on you, you had to go to the office to get them to open the door with a Master Key.  The park came the next day and changed the door and lock mechanism on this cabin for us.    The park is fantastic if you have kids you need to entertain.  With the waterpark (remember to press the button on the post inside the gate to keep the water flowing), a really heated pool and then another pool closer to the water park which is big and good for kids of all ages to just walk into.  This one seemed slightly heated, it wasn't cold enough for the kids to get out, but not as heated as the other pool.  There is also a big tennis court that also has a basketball hoops.  There are also numerous garden games out like chess and connect 4.  Plus of course they rode their bikes and scooters around.  Overall, our trip was enjoyable, our accommodation was very clean, and helped by being newish, and the staff we had interactions with were polite and helpful.  Though the night manager didn't leave notes for the maintenance crew the next day on what was actually wrong with our lock, and so we had to explain it all over again.   Would definitely go back for another stay.  This type of accommodation is good if you have a family and then the grandparent's come also.

Stayed here a couple of days with my kids. The facilities are very clean and close to the Byron Bay centre and beaches. It has everything we needed as jumping pillow, waterpark, pool, heated pool, garden games, tennis court etc. Best holiday park so far. Would love to visit soon again!

Nous avons séjourné une semaine ici et je déconseille fortement ce camping ! Le personnel n’est pas sympathique (attention ils se rendent sur les emplacements en votre absence !) et les emplacements sont vraiment mauvais. On nous a d’abord attribué un emplacement sans herbe ; il a plu durant la nuit et nous nous sommes réveillés dans la boue. Nous avons dû demander nous-mêmes à changer d’emplacement.
Il a continué de pleuvoir toute la semaine et nous étions encore sous l’eau. Aucun geste n’a été fait par le camping envers les campeurs, alors que le camping n’était pas rempli. Le pire, c’est qu’ils ont continué à attribuer les emplacements boueux à d’autres personnes. C’est honteux !
Amazing park to stay at with kids. Amenities were clean and staff were helpful. Will definitely be coming back

We had an absolutely outstanding weekend at Discovery Parks Byron Bay! We have a 17 month old who had so much fun in the waterpark and on the jumping pillow! We stayed in one of the beautiful Safari tents (Not really sure if you can call it a tent because it felt like we were in a Beautiful hotel room from the inside) The staff were absolutely lovely and made check-in a very smooth process.
We have already started planning our return trip for October where we plan to take our entire extended family because we loved it that much.
Perfect place for kids to play and adults to relax, Different price points for accommodation. They even had food trucks come in on Saturday night so we didn’t have to cook!

Great location really enjoyed both our stays.

Meg and Jen were great at reception and really made our stay special upgrading us to the safari tent.

The tents were great, very clean, spacious and everything you need in the unit. With a nice BBQ on the balcony.

Facilities on the park were fabulous and even the public toilets and showers were really clean.

Tennis court and rackets available to hire for $10.

A great perk for staying at discovery parks Byron bay is the little cafe next door to reception, they have great coffee for a morning pick me up.

Honestly didnt know what to expect... This place is awesome! As a Canadian family with a 3 year old and a 8 month old it was perfect. We ended up with a unintentional late check in and we didnt have a phone to call for late check in but thankfully an amazing lady let us borrow her phone to call the number. It would be great if they emailed not texted info. But once we called he gave us our key and passcode to the gate and away we went. We got just the smallest cabin and it worked good for us. The floors werent that clean but beds were. The splash park was so much fun for both kids! And the pool was awesome too. Really appreciate the sunshelters for us northerners as we are almost glistening in the sun. There is a cook kitchen with full ovens and stoves if you want to cook more meals. The showers/toilets were so nice, nicer then our cabins shower. The laundry was nice too even though we didnt use it. Sad we didnt stay longer! It was awesome! Really appreciate it was gated so you really felt safe (even though we never felt unsafe outside of the gate either) Thank you for doing a great job!

Stayed here 3 nights.Staff was lovely on every interaction but the place it’s self could use some improvement.Good location.
First night i got in the bed felt like the sheets had sand then i decided to check . The sheets and doona were dirty .I even found someone else’s hair.Pic below.
2nd day no water on the tap for at least 30 minutes in the morning no notice given.This delayed our whole day plan due to not bring able to shower.
2nd night the shower only had cold water coming out😱
3rd morning hot water would just stop mid shower😱
The fly screen was also broken so hard to move it.Shower has no pressure at all.

Very disappointing experience overall. If you’re a family, maybe it’s not the park for you. Stayed in an unpowered site. The backpackers next to us decided to have a party until after 2am. The next morning we were told they were aware of who was staying next to us and apparently it’s not the first time. Honestly think in that case we should receive a refund. Cancelled the rest of our stay. Feels like one big backpackers. Great if that’s what you’re after.
Sehr gute Sanitär Anlagen. Nahe am Stadtkern. Etwas ausserhalb kann gratis Parkiert werden.

Lovely location and lovely quirky, picturesque  park. We stayed in a Safari tent which was very comfortable with the added bonus for me of having the preserved railway line immediately behind our accommodation! ||The location is designed mainly for self catering, so if you don’t want to do this, then you have the trip into town which certainly at the weekends is busy ( but only about a couple of miles).||Very nice place!
The lakeside cabins were fantastic for a family! Service was great and staff was always ready to help. Lots of kids activities

By far the most amazing holiday my children and I have ever had and its all thanks to you! The water park,  the beautiful villa, the wonderful staff, we were just blown away and didn't want to ever leave! How this place isn't rated 5 stars is beyond me. Will be back as soon as possible and will be bringing all my family and friends along with me.
Thankyou thankyou thankyou 🙏🩵

A busy happening place full of young travellers. Tent spots are pretty small, facilities are pretty busy, the cafe just outside is really trendy and nice. Price is decent, probably why it's so busy. The facilities are new and nice.

My partner, 4 year old daughter and myself stayed here for 3 nights and it was such a fantastic stay! Our cabin was right across from the splash park which was very continent for us. The splash park was by far the highlight of the stay - I had the best time on there too haha the park itself is well kept and it has activities such as yoga and a fish and chip van on site (open on certain days). It was a nice kid friendly park and I would definitely come back

The only thing would be that the cabin I stayed in could use some love and was a little outdated. The floorboard flooring felt dirty but was manageable for 3 nights… if it was a longer stay then it may have began to be uncomfortable

Thanks for an amazing time!

11/10, got little kids? Brilliant place to stay. Never left the park! Kiddies self entertained with the amazing water park, pool and hiring the equipment there (so cheap)
Rooms brilliant, facilities brilliant and mostly the team!! They were so welcoming, prompt to help us with some first aid and incredibly helpful to us.
So peaceful at night & morning, easy to sleep in even though there’s a heap of young families around.
Looking to have this as one of our annual getaways.

Ich war für drei Nächte im Discovery Park Byron Bay und sehr zufrieden. Ich habe in einem Safari tent geschlafen und die Ausstattung war wirklich gut! Besonders das eigene Bad fand ich toll. Das einzige, was ich anmerken würde, ist die doch recht schmutzige Außenbereich, die Polster könnten mal gereinigt werden. Ansonsten eine tolle Erfahrung und die Mitarbeiter am Empfang waren wirklich super freundlich und hilfsbereit.
Um ins Zentrum zu kommen, sollte man ein Auto dabei haben, zu Fuß ist es gerade bei der Wärme doch sehr weit.
Really nice park - only issue, they need to crack down on parties and late night noise. There were people have loud parties in camping area until 2am!
텐트 숙소 추천! 친구들이랑 오기 좋아요 식기도구, 바베큐시설 갖춰져있음 욕실엔 샴푸, 컨디셔너, 바디워시 있음 다만 숙소 내 주차는 차량 1대만 가능해요 (차량이 두 대 이상이라면 바깥에 스트릿파킹 가능)

We stay one night lake site two bedroom cabin. Cabin was confortable and well equipment. Airconditiom unit is only at kitchen and livingroom side, bedrooms dont have seperate airconditions.Site is clean and tidy. There is a pool and water park for kids, but need some renovation. İnternet was work for a hour and stop, no internet.

Was charged $335 a night through booking.com for a tired and rundown cabin near a busy road .
Nowhere to park when signing in at recepion because the area is used as a full-time carpark. Definitely will not be rushing  back
Although the staff where very friendly
First impressions…. Concrete…. I liked that

とてもいい場所です。サーフィンと観光を楽しむために来ました。トイレ、シャワー、プール、炊事場はとても綺麗でした。長期滞在滞在でも問題ありません。ランドリーマシーンは台数が少ないので混雑すると使えないかもしれません。今回子供を連れて来ましたが、プールが子供にとっては最高の場所なようです。また訪れたいと思いました。ただ立地だけが残念でした。サーフィンと観光のためには車で行く必要があります。行くたびに〜10ドル程度の駐車場代が必要です。ですがスタッフの対応も素晴らしくとても好感の持てるいい場所でした。また訪れたいと思いました。

Love this family getaway ❤️ so convenient and affordable. Would recommend if you are camping to be aware of if it rains it tends to pool in the larger camp sites. Wouldn't stop us from coming back, but we would be more mindful on our setup!
So many different types of accommodations for any budget!
Highly recommended the water park as our toddler loved it so much 😍
Great bathrooms and showers for campers!
5 minute drive to main street.

Mostly the Staff and Facilities are Fabulous here.  It a beautiful location. Very leafy, green tranquil… However…there seems to be a Tyrant teaching yoga here! And taking herself far too seriously. I got up early and enthusiastic for yoga. But the Park is so Large that my friend and I got a little lost… We arrived only 5 minutes late. And the door was locked. it looked empty. We found another member of staff who tried to let us in. But the yoga lady came to the door. And barked at us. You are 15 minutes late… and I can’t let you in…and she closed the door in our faces…I was completely stunned!! We were no where near 15 minutes late! Even the member of staff I found.. didn’t understand why she couldn’t let us in…I had got up and had a shower early! And was excited for this class. I really needed to stretch and relax! What gives this so called yoga teacher the right to deny guests excess who were only 5 minutes late. Entry.. I was really angry and upset. It spoiled my morning. And put a cloud over my whole stay! I really hope that in the future who ever teaches yoga will be a bit more relaxed about guests showing up 5 minutes late! I know we were at the pavilion at 7.35. Because we stopped to ask a staff member for directions. This teacher should go elsewhere! And not teach in Byron Bay. Which is famous for it’s laid back attitude! You can’t be so inflexible to teaching! I should know! I am a Pilates instructor! And I would never do this to anyone coming in a few minutes late! I think the way my friend and I were treated was disgustingly. So if you want to attend yoga here. Make sure you get there 20 minutes early! And remember that you have to walk around the entire lake to get there!!! Or you will receive the wrath of the teacher.

Bad experience - we were given "half a campsite" size-wise, we could hardly fit our tent on it, couldn't fit the trailer or the car on it and were completely squeezed in, sharing the site with three large garbage bins and a tree. This happened besides the fact that I had booked over the phone and we had clearly booked for familiy with kids (not a single backpacker with a hiking tent).

Stayed in the adorable little Safari tent.
Everything was clean and cute, and the park itself was lovely, with pop up food trucks and lots of greenery. Would recommend this place as a great alternative to the overly expensive Air BnBs and Hotels in the main part of Byron.
Great place to stay
We had great time staying at the property.  Excellent almost brand new cabin, located near the beaches of Byron.
주차공간이 너무 협소하고 비치에서도 멀어 차로 이동해야 한다.
Amazing park. So busy we could only stay one night but was worth it. The water park was perfect for the kids they enjoyed it. I loved how it was on a lake it was beautiful. Would recommend
Self-catering, affordable, and geared for young families.  Watermark and play areas make this a great holiday destination.  We stayed overnight and enjoyed the facilities.

Close to everything was perfekt. Great facilities for both adults and children. Lots of events. The sweetest staff (Angela is an Angel) Clean toilets and common areas like the kitchen. Perfectly sized camping site. Nice price as well. Travelling in a campervan as a family of 5 (kids age from 7 to 15). Second time we stayed here. Last time 8 years ago (why so long ago - well we are from Denmark, so not every day we come by Byron Bay)
amazing staff and perfect location❤️ can’t wait to come back🫶🏻

Die Anlage des Discoverypark liegt einige Kilometer von der Stadt entfernt und vom Strand auch weiter entfernt. Im Park gibt es verschiedene Bungalows mit Parkflächen davor, Imbisstände, Kinderbecken mit Rutschen, Swimmingpool und einem künstlichen See. Die Bugalows sind geräumig und mit allem für Selbstversorger ausgerüstet.

Avoid this campsite!

This campsite was a huge disappointment. The tent area is located in a very remote and inconvenient part of the park, right next to the Byron Bay highway. The constant noise from passing cars made it impossible to get a good night’s sleep!

The campsite itself was in terrible condition. The grass was mostly dead, with lots of sand, rocks, and uneven ground. Even after laying down two layers of ground mats and a carpet, the surface was still so hard that it hurt to walk on.

To make matters worse, the tents are packed extremely close to each other with no privacy at all. If you open your tent window, people in the tents next to you can see everything—it’s super awkward!

On top of that, the location is so far out that there’s no WiFi and barely any phone signal. It feels completely disconnected, but not in a good way.

I absolutely do not recommend this campsite. It’s uncomfortable, noisy, and lacks basic amenities. Save your money and book somewhere else!

GREAT park and great facilities! Just don't buy from the fish & chip/burger van WORST value for money - an absolute joke and rip off what they charge compared to what they serve. Uber eats will be better value and cheaper than that!

Service was fantastic considering our booking wasn't in the system, we were given keys and a room on the spot being Christmas night that our booking was for.
Location and kids activities within the park and surrounding is fantastic.
The room however needed some attention to cleaning as there was mold in the bathroom shower and ceilings a long width a very dusty dirty floor. Some of the linen was stained and curtains too. There were little things like the screen doors not shutting and skirting boards falling a part. We have yet to mention to reception as they are not available until 8am in the morning.

Great campsite & great staff. I had an issue with the roof of my campervan & Ant fixed it straight away for me 👌 it was on Christmas Day too.
Definitely recommend!!

The park is fantastic for families and especially those with young kids. The pool and water park are great. The bathrooms however were pretty dirty most of the time. I had to complain about one cubicle because of how filthy it was!

Vinimos en camper, 3 amigas, nos dijeron 57 por noche, nos quedamos 2 noches por lo tanto serían 114, la chica nos dice que el precio de las noches no son siempre igual nos dice 140, al momento de hacernos firmar el check in no le andaba la
Impresora y dijo se las mando por Mail, hooooo sorpresa al Mail! El pago realizado al momento de check in fue de 115, fue solo un depósito, luego nos descontarán un total de. 179, en ningún momento se dijo ese costo, por qué si era ese costo nos íbamos a otro cercano a la ciudad por el mismo dinero. Cuando fuimos a reclamar claramente nada, se lavó las manos la chica diciendo q ella siempre dice que la noche varía, etc etc etc, un afano! Creo que la noche en hostel nos salía más barato.
Good hotel
房間非常舒服、乾淨

Could be a a very nice place but almost all  the amenities are very dirty and low maintenance aircon whit a lot of dust,tent whit mould,also the pool seat all dirty and broken,to be honest we don't recommend this place.
Wifi needs improving
Le personnel est vraiment très gentil, le bungalow était immaculé, bien fourni, au calme, ventilateur et climatisation. Un excellent séjour!

Booked on 11/3/24 for 5 nights for the end of October and beginning of November 2024. Told them we had a large 29ft van, as we always do when booking.
Initially we were put on too small a site, so the whole tow bar was on the road! There were several large sites nearby that would have been perfect. Told it was fully booked and we couldn’t move. Monica eventually rang back and said we could move to another site. It also was way too small, with the same issue.
Steve (new employee) came to the rescue and went and spoke to reception staff. Finally put on a large site near the glamping tents. Steve came and checked it was ok and we fitted, which we did. (He even trimmed a branch so our van didn’t get scratched.
Unfortunately two families opposite us (tent nos. 220/221), with a combined 9 kids spent the weekend yelling across to each other, while the kids were riding/wandering all over the road (no helmets) and riding between our car and the awning starting at 5am and going all day and into the night, sometimes till after midnight.
We complained to Monica at reception and she spoke to them. Unfortunately she also told them who had complained, so we were subjected to snide remarks and intimidating behaviour from the kids and adults for the rest of the time they were there.
Needless to say, we didn’t bother complaining a second time.
We checked the so called “fully booked park” each day and found many still vacant sites that would have fitted our van easily and not been near the glamping tents!
Thus our experience from start to finish was very upsetting and we would not stay at this park again and nor would we recommend it to anyone else!
Thanks Steve for your assistance. It was greatly appreciated. Just a pity no one else working there was as helpful!

We arrived a little early and the receptionist told us that they were fully booked and we would have to wait. We were not given a warm welcome, as we are used to at other G'Day parks. After we had walked around the park, we saw that several pitches were free. Even days later, there were still pitches available. We are simply being lied to. I do not understand why caravans have to leave the site by 10 a.m. in the morning and arriving guests are not allowed in until 2 p.m. The caravan pitches are very unkempt, so much leaves on the ground that the rain cannot drain off at all. As the first pitch was very unkempt, we asked for another pitch. The receptionist was not very happy about this and made us wait until she assigned us a new pitch. It seems that the receptionist does not like customer contact, which is a shame. We have been to a few other G'Day parks, but we would not recommend this one.
What a hot ,dirty dump and they expect people to stay ,the box you pay to live in needs a really good clean

I would not recommend.The floors were filthy dirty. On arrival the floors had sand and dirt all over them. We had a baby crawling and it was covered in dirt within minutes of being on floor. It was unsafe. The kids feet were black upon walking on floor. I am still trying to get the black out of my feet. We had about $300 worth of food went to waist because the oven didn’t work prperly. It turned on but it only went to 120 that is the highest. So everything (all our food)  went to waist. We had no food. They offered to send maintenance on day 2 of our last day but we had sleeping kids and baby. It wasn’t broken it was just insufficient. You couldn’t cook anything in it.  You cannot tell me that is the first complaint and they havnt fixed it. . The location of the park means you have to then drive and get food but it’s so busy it’s difficult to get a park in town (Byron Bay) and everything is so expensive and usually vegan. and with three kids and a baby it was impossible.so needless to say the kids and adults were so hungry. Hungry and dirty. I would not recommend. I am not sure if cleaners were contracted but they need to be sacked. You cannot have guests going into rooms. I am sure they have mops. - I truly would like a refund it was disgusting.
Good place for parking and cooking. Quiet place and good for vacation to relax.

This was by far my favourite G’day park ever. We stayed in the deluxe safari tents and it was beautiful, amazing facilities other than the washing machines being out of order. There is heaps of activity’s for kids and complimentary yoga on Tuesday mornings. Loved this place!

They have a guy running around at 1pm with a leave blower, blowing leaves from one side of the road to the other. Makes no sense!!! It’s freaking loud in the tents no rest for anyone. It’s 2pm and I can still him. Never again!

Wit waren für zwei Nächte mit dem Camper an dort. Die Küche ist sauber und ordentlich. Die Sanitäranlagen sind ebenfalls sauber und ordentlich. Das Schwimmbad hat den Kids (4 Jahre und 10 Monate gefallen)

Am Rad des Parks ist ein Flusslauf wir hatten uns dann schnell einen Platz mehr in der Mitte ausgesucht da es recht streng gerochen hatte.

Leider ist man zu Fuß recht weit weg von Zentrum in der Hitze war es nicht leicht mit Kinderwagen und Kind.

In der Nähe ist eine Bushaltestelle jedoch ist der Plan nicht so gut.

Wenn man nur dort hin will um auf dem Platz zu bleiben okay aber wenn man auch ins Zentrum will ist der Platz schlecht.

Byron is amazing, like a step back in time and into true meaning of life.

The cafe out the front has great coffee and amazing food.

The 2 bedroom cabin, was affordable, great size, toilet and bathroom, kitchen, living room and dining.

100% we will be return visitors

Overpriced for what you get. I paid $1100 for 3 nights in a deluxe cabin. I don’t like complaining but have to leave some feedback for others.

WIFI not working, which is particularly bad as the mobile reception is poor in the park. Others mentioned this in their review too, so no one bother to fixed it after many months?

Waterpark and Swimming pool closes at 5pm. 5PM!!! This is a first for me, I have seen 8pm but 5PM? Big disappointment for my teenagers.

Speed bumps are badly designed. Every time we leave it’s a Kangaroo ride.

Fly screen has a whole, front door doesn’t close properly, smoke detectors kicked in multiple time when cooking spaghetti sauce, we had to take the battery out. TV remote broken.

IF you pay close attention to the positive reviews on this site you can see some of them are paid.

The location is lovely with being close to town. The one plus.
